subject: Cutiefly, a tiny round fairy-like Pokemon with large round eyes, antennae, and small translucent wings, floating on a pink background
description: A very small round creature with a spherical tan-cream body hovers against a soft pink background. It has two large bright round eyes that dominate its face, two thin antennae sprouting from its head, and small translucent wings on either side. The overall visual impression is of something extremely tiny and delicate — a fairy-insect hybrid. The pink background and the soft lighting give the image a cheerful, sweet tone. The creature appears to be floating gently with wings barely extended.
foreground: Cutiefly floating, small round body with antennae and wings
